# Puffle

> Puffle is an AI GTM operator for founder-led teams. It finds growth opportunities, discovers and qualifies leads, and prepares personalized outbound across email and LinkedIn.

Puffle is built by DevelopIQ Inc. in San Francisco, California.

## Product

Puffle follows one operating loop:

1. Learn the company, market, customer, and GTM goal.
2. Propose focused growth strategies.
3. Discover and qualify relevant companies and people.
4. Prepare personalized email and LinkedIn outbound.
5. Let the user review and approve before launch.
6. Keep replies and next actions organized in Unibox.

Puffle is designed for founder-led and lean GTM teams. It is not a fully autonomous sender: users approve strategies and outbound before launch.

## Canonical pages

- [Homepage](https://www.puffle.ai/): official Puffle website
- [AI GTM agent](https://www.puffle.ai/ai-gtm-agent): product definition and capabilities
- [How Puffle works](https://www.puffle.ai/how-it-works): end-to-end workflow
- [Founder-led GTM](https://www.puffle.ai/founder-led-gtm): target customer and use cases
- [Outbound automation](https://www.puffle.ai/outbound-automation): email and LinkedIn workflow
- [Puffle vs. Clay](https://www.puffle.ai/compare/puffle-vs-clay): product comparison
- [Pricing](https://www.puffle.ai/pricing): current plans and lead volumes
- [About](https://www.puffle.ai/about): company facts
- [Application](https://app.puffle.ai/): Puffle product
- [Documentation](https://docs.puffle.ai/): product documentation

## Current pricing

- Free: $0, including 200 one-time fresh leads.
- Starter: $100 per month, including 1,000 fresh leads per month.
- Pro: $250 per month, including 5,000 fresh leads per month.
- Custom: contact Puffle for tailored volume and workflows.

## Contact

- Sales and company questions: kush@puffle.ai
- Careers: careers@puffle.ai
